chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1674 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 30-03-2023 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Muhammad Mustaqeem Qureshi, Assistant Commissioner, Faiz Ganj (respondent No.3) files compliance report, which is taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to Mr. Amjad Ali Bhutto Advocate, who holds brief on behalf of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, counsel for the petitioner and being satisfied seeks disposal of this petition in the light of compliance report, filed today. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
